message:
fix: add 'static lifetime annotations for Text/Line/Span return types

All methods and functions that produce owned Text/Line/Span values now
annotate them with 'static since the rendered content doesn't borrow
from any input. Fixes 10 compilation errors in downstream consumers
(frankensearch-tui, frankensearch-ops, frankensearch-fsfs).

Also suppress unused variable warning for anchor_vrow in textarea.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
